name: Izuna Hatsuse
description:
__Race:__ Werebeast

Izuna Hatsuse is a Werebeast girl and the former ambassador of the Werebeast race to Immanity. After Sora and Shiro forced the werebeasts to join the Commonwealth of Elkia, Izuna was directed by Miko to follow and learn from them. Steph has noted that she actually shares similarities to Sora and Shiro, such as lacking common sense, being arrogant towards others, and being extremely smart and competent at gaming. She mostly exhibits an innocent personality pertaining to her age yet is very competent at playing games to the point of representing the Werebeasts in national games against other races. She possesses all the incredible physical abilities found in all Werebeasts as well as the rare Blood Break found in a select few Werebeast individuals.
